ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Larry Shockey, Esq. for Plaintiff: Natalia Hernandez, also present, was swoarn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewing of the declaration filed, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Richard B. Erodersen ind. and dba Ruffhouse Dogs.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgement and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.

April 13, 2007
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $21,100.07
Costs $603.50, for a total of $21,703.57
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
